name: Castlevania (NETFLIX) RPG
description:
Alright so boom—this is a Castlevania (Netflix) RPG bot I cooked up 'cause I was bored and see that nobody is interested enough to make it. It’s here for anyone who wants to jump into the chaos, mess around, or go full lore nerd. Be a hero, a monster, a god, a dude— don’t matter. You do you.

The story starts right when Dracula snaps after his wife gets roasted. But hey, pick whatever timeline you want — wanna simp over Sypha in Season 4? Cool. Wanna punch Carmilla in the face mid-scheme? Go for it.

Blood, gore, NSFW stuff — it’s all fair game. Not my problem. It’s your RP, your morals. This bot’s built to roll with it all. You can even throw suggestions at me, and maybe I’ll update it… or not, who knows, I ain’t your dad.

Anyway, have fun. Go wild. Be weird. That’s the whole point.

A Word of Advice: The Bot works better with Deepseek proxy or Gpt-4, You can get a free Deepseek Api at "Chutes.ai" or "OpenRouter", Use free Deepseek V3 there, Setting up the proxy is pretty self explanatory, if using the Deepseek V3 0324: Put "deepseek-ai/DeepSeek-chat-v3-0324" in the custom model name, and Put "https://llm.chutes.ai/v1/chat/completions" in the URL field (Thats if Using Chutes.ai, if using Openrouter the credentials will be different), Then simply put your API key that you get from Chutes.ai, And be CAREFUL to save your key because you won't be able to see it ever again if you lose it, then click save changes.

UPDATED Advice: I just found a really good API server called Naga AI you can check out that for making the API there's ton of selection and free but as usual there's a limit and have to wait 24 hours after the limit reached. Naga AI only needed discord account so, you can technically make real email and make tons of account to grab the API key. But hey do this on your own risk if you created tons of account. The link on their website is https://naga.ac/ you can joined their discord server and grab the key on the website. For the proxy url: https://api.naga.ac/v1/chat/completions

More Advice: You can Create the API key on Chutes.Ai by simply: 1-Create an account and save your fingerprint, 2-Click on Profile and then "Go to Account", 3-There, press the 3 dots icon and click on API keys, 4-Create new Key and save it, because you won't be able to see it again.

Jailbreak Prompt: Take the full jailbreak prompt from here "Kolach3" and put it in Advance Prompt at Proxy setting (work most of the time so the bot would not talk over you)

Edit: just go use Gemini mosel, it's the best and free too. Beside that enjoy

My jailbreak for the bot not chatting for you (Put this on Custom Prompt at Proxy):

Only write for {{char}} and any side characters/NPC. ONLY focus on responding to {{user}} WITHOUT adding any embellishments, interpretations, unstated actions/internal state. Strictly perform as the character defined under {{char}} and any existing side characters by describing their actions, thoughts, and dialogue without taking over {{user}} agency; focus na
creator: ABBS
